"https://api.github.com/users/paberr", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-34067", "cvss": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-617", "name": "Reachable Assertion"}], "description": "### Impact
`HistoryTreeProof::verify` panics on a malformed proof where `history.len() != positions.len()` due to `assert_eq!(history.len(), positions.len())`. 

The proof object is derived from untrusted p2p responses (`ResponseTransactionsProof.proof`) and is therefore attacker-controlled at the network boundary until validated. A malicious peer could trigger a crash by returning a crafted inclusion proof with a length mismatch.

### Patches
[The patch for this vulnerability](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/6ff0800e8e031363e787c827d8d033e5694e4e6a) is included as part of [v1.3.0](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0).

### Workarounds
No known workarounds know.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00318, "percentile": 0.23525}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-264v-m8fm-76jm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T19:20:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-264v-m8fm-76jm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-264v-m8fm-76jm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34067"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T21:17:07Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T19:20:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-264v-m8fm-76jm", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3659", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/6ff0800e8e031363e787c827d8d033e5694e4e6a", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34067", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-264v-m8fm-76jm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-264v-m8fm-76jm", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-transaction: Panic via `HistoryTreeProof` length mismatch", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:22:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-264v-m8fm-76jm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-transaction"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-transaction: Panic via `HistoryTreeProof` length mismatch
